creator: Thulean Perspective
description: This playlist contains videos with various topics by Thulean Perspective (Varg Vikernes, known from the band Burzum) from 2018. Music clips, the series on paganism and videos about his role playing game Myfarog is not included here. These are Varg's takes on paganism, philosophy, democracy and modern society. Despite his channel being very popular (or thanks to), it got deleted so I'm backing up the videos here for archiving purposes. 2014: https://archive.org/details/thuleanperspective2014 2015: https://archive.org/details/thuleanperspective2015 2016: https://archive.org/details/thuleanperspective2016 2017: https://archive.org/details/thuleanperspective2017 2018: https://archive.org/details/thuleanperspective2018 ForeBears movie: https://archive.org/details/forebears_full_movie2013 On Paganism: https://archive.org/details/varg_vikernes-on_paganism Burzum: https://archive.org/details/thuleanperspective_burzum On RPGs & Myfarog: https://archive.org/details/thuleanperspective_on_rpgs_and_myfarog
